agents_note._note: manifest-dev ships zero agents. Quality review is the `review-code` skill (one dimension per invocation); functional verifier behaviors are skills too (`check-pr`, `poll-slack`, `review-prompt`). `/do` launches independent verifier executions using verify.prompt; there is no verify.agent field.

host_continuation._note: Host goal/continuation support is optional. When available, skills set a durable completion contract; when absent or disabled, Pi runs prompt-level skills without continuous host enforcement.
